# Android Development Guidelines

Auto-generated seed context for the Android app area.

## Active Technologies

- Native Android client technology to be finalized during feature planning

## Project Structure

```text

test/
```

## Code Style

Favor native Android patterns, accessibility, resilient state handling, and contract alignment with backend APIs.

## Recent Changes

- Repository reorganized so Android planning and implementation live under `android/`
